checkpoint.lastFinding: A failed awaited side effect can escape without explicit classification or recovery.

history.summary: Unsafe JSON.parse path returns unvalidated data as a trusted Result.
history.learnedPattern: Validate JSON parse failures before using parsed payloads.
history.memoryDelta: Added a JSON-shape validation heuristic to future reviews.

history.summary: Private records can be returned before verifying the caller owns the account.
history.learnedPattern: Verify authorization before returning private records.
history.memoryDelta: Added an authorization-check heuristic to critic reviews.

history.summary: A failed awaited side effect can escape without explicit classification or recovery.
history.learnedPattern: Wrap awaited side effects in explicit error handling.
history.memoryDelta: Added an async side-effect handling pattern to persistent review memory.
